title: Kumoh Configuration
description: Configuration file for Kumoh — a Cloudflare Workers framework powered by Hono + Drizzle.

name.description: The application name. Used for the worker name and resource naming (e.g. D1 database, KV namespace, R2 bucket, queue).

rateLimiters.description: Cloudflare Rate Limiting bindings. Each entry becomes a named binding (e.g. 'global' → RATE_LIMITER_GLOBAL).

limit.description: Maximum number of requests allowed per period.

period.description: Time window in seconds. Must be 10 or 60.

email.description: Email Routing configuration — managed by `kumoh setup email`.

domain.description: The domain with Cloudflare Email Routing enabled (e.g. kumo.ooo).

state.description: Provisioned resource state — auto-managed by `kumoh deploy`. Do not edit manually.

domain.description: Custom domain assigned to the worker (e.g. api.kumoh.dev). Set during deploy.

migrations.description: Cumulative Durable Object migration history — auto-managed by kumoh deploy. Mirrors wrangler.json migrations format.
